title: Remote UI Designer Jobs in Canada | Montreal Jobs
description: Research current remote UI designer job openings across Canada. Real companies actively hiring, salary data, and required skillsets. Updated July 2025.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary for a remote UI designer in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: The average salary for a remote UI Designer in Canada typically ranges from $85,000 to $130,000 CAD per year, depending on experience, specialization, and the hiring company. Senior roles at major tech companies like Shopify or Wealthsimple can exceed $150,000 CAD.

mainEntity.name: Which Canadian companies hire remote UI designers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Many top Canadian tech companies have embraced remote-first or hybrid models. Companies frequently hiring remote UI designers include Shopify, 1Password, Wealthsimple, Clio, Jobber, FreshBooks, and Dapper Labs.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to live in a specific province for a 'Remote Canada' role?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most 'Remote Canada' roles allow you to work from anywhere within the country, provided you have reliable internet and can overlap with core business hours (usually EST or PST). However, some companies may have provincial restrictions for tax or payroll reasons, which are usually stated in the job description.

mainEntity.name: What are the key skills required for UI design roles right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employers strongly prioritize mastery of Figma, experience with design systems, a strong portfolio demonstrating clean visual design and interaction design, and an understanding of accessibility (WCAG) standards. Experience with prototyping and a basic understanding of frontend constraints are highly valued.
